93.title: Default Question (bhutan) (bhutan)
93.mainQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT sod.SOD_ID, osr.PRICE_CODE, opt.[LOCATION],opt.SERVICE,opt.SUPPLIER,opt.CODE, sod.POLICY_TYPE, sod.INFANT_FROM, sod.INFANT_TO,sod.CHILD_FROM, sod.CHILD_TO, sod.ADULT_FROM,sod.ADULT_TO ,opt.AC FROM OPT 
INNER JOIN SOD on opt.SOD_ID = sod.SOD_ID
INNER JOIN OSR on opt.OPT_ID = osr.OPT_ID
where DATE_TO >= GETDATE() 
and SERVICE ='AC'
and opt.AC = 'Y'
and osr.PRICE_CODE = 'WW'
and sod.POLICY_TYPE = 'O'
ORDER BY opt.SUPPLIER;
 
SELECT DISTINCT sod.SOD_ID, osr.PRICE_CODE, opt.[LOCATION],opt.SERVICE,opt.SUPPLIER,opt.CODE, sod.POLICY_TYPE, sod.INFANT_FROM, sod.INFANT_TO,sod.CHILD_FROM, sod.CHILD_TO, sod.ADULT_FROM,sod.ADULT_TO ,opt.AC FROM OPT 
INNER JOIN SOD on opt.SOD_ID = sod.SOD_ID
INNER JOIN OSR on opt.OPT_ID = osr.OPT_ID
where DATE_TO >= GETDATE() 
and SERVICE ='AC'
and opt.AC = 'N'
and osr.PRICE_CODE = 'WW'
and sod.POLICY_TYPE = 'O'
ORDER BY opt.SUPPLIER;
 
SELECT DISTINCT sod.SOD_ID, CRM.CODE, CRM.[NAME], sod.POLICY_TYPE, sod.INFANT_FROM, sod.INFANT_TO,sod.CHILD_FROM, sod.CHILD_TO, sod.ADULT_FROM,sod.ADULT_TO from OPT
inner JOIN CRM on opt.SUPPLIER = crm.CODE
INNER JOIN SOD on opt.SOD_ID = sod.SOD_ID
INNER JOIN OSR on opt.OPT_ID = osr.OPT_ID
where DATE_TO >= GETDATE() 
and SERVICE ='AC'
and osr.PRICE_CODE = 'WW'
and sod.POLICY_TYPE = 'S'
order by crm.CODE
